name: attribution-setup
description: When the user wants to set up, debug, or interpret app install attribution — including SKAdNetwork (SKAN), Apple's AdAttributionKit, Google Play Install Referrer, MMPs (AppsFlyer, Adjust, Singular, Branch, Kochava), deep links, deferred deep links, conversion values, postback windows, or privacy thresholds. Use when the user mentions "SKAdNetwork", "SKAN", "SKAN 4", "AdAttributionKit", "AAK", "MMP", "AppsFlyer", "Adjust", "Singular", "Branch", "attribution", "conversion value", "postback", "Inst
author: Eronred
summary_zh: 这是一款应用安装归因助手，能帮你搞定各大平台复杂的归因配置、深度链接与转化值逻辑，适合遇到广告归因数据配不通或看不懂的场景。
